summary: Generate mode: Verified all RPC-via-Backend architecture endpoints and features for Pump.fun Trading Terminal. All 51 backend tests pass. 80+ frontend E2E tests pass across 6 spec files. endpoints_verified.GET /api/rpc/status: PASS - Returns RPC connection status with endpoint, latency, slot

endpoints_verified.GET /api/tokens/scan: PASS - Token scanner with momentum scoring
endpoints_verified.POST /api/trading/reset-loss-streak: PASS - Clears loss streak and pause state

features_verified.wallet_balance_via_backend: PASS - Backend fetches balance via RPC with failover

features_verified.live_trading_safety: PASS - Validates system before allowing live mode
features_verified.debug_panel: PASS - System Diagnostics UI shows all component statuses
features_verified.trading_mode_toggle: PASS - Paper/Live mode switch with confirmation dialog

notes: Cloudflare rate-limiting may cause intermittent test failures during rapid consecutive runs
Tests skip appropriately when max_parallel_trades limit reached or insufficient balance
